name: Porites Coral Geochemical Proxies from TIAREI-3B Event at Moorea, 2008
description: Geochemical measurements from a Porites sp. coral sample collected at the TIAREI-3B event site in Moorea, French Polynesia. The dataset includes Sr/Ca, Mg/Ca, δ18O, and δ13C ratios alongside age, elevation, and precise spatial coordinates for the sampling location in July 2008.
